function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical birthdays from 10_entities/cast per AGENTS guidance; anchored 'coming up next' to current date from context.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-31. Birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed the earliest upcoming month-day is 04-25, and 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms the canonical name for that date as Claudia Reiter. No other cast file in the birthday search results shares 04-25.
